title: VaultEntry
description: Single entry in the Cold Audit Vault. Entries form a cryptographically chained append-only log.

entry_id.description: SHA-256(prev_hash + str(sequence)). Derived identifier for this entry.

prev_hash.description: entry_hash of the previous entry, or 'GENESIS' for the first entry.

sequence.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number starting at 0.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) at which this entry was written.

event_type.description: Category of event recorded in this entry.

session_id.description: Session identifier this event belongs to.

agent_id.description: model_id of the agent that generated this event.

payload_hash.description: SHA-256 of the message payload associated with this event. Empty string if not applicable.

detail.description: Event-specific structured data. Schema varies by event_type.

entry_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical serialization of this entry (excluding entry_hash). Validates entry integrity.
